tasks.task: Move streaming server from orders/streaming to /streaming_server
Move Celery beat schedule from orders/apps.py to global configuration
Optimize process_mobile_orders memory usage by reading jsonl line by line
Replace naive datetime.now() with aware datetime.now(timezone.utc)
Resolve PermissionError by synchronizing Docker user with host UID/GID
R-01: Fix temp file write logic in process_mobile_orders — write errored records back to temp file so they are retried on the next beat cycle (Option A: clear on success, keep failures for retry)

R-02: Fix wrong field names in UserMessage.objects.create inside tasks.py — replace message= with message_body= and remove non-existent is_error= argument; add is_error BooleanField to UserMessage model if the flag is required
R-03: Replace fragile 'record' in locals() guard in tasks.py error handler — split except clause into separate json.JSONDecodeError and (KeyError, ValidationError) branches
R-04: Replace naive datetime.now() with datetime.now(timezone.utc) in streaming_server/main.py to match Django UTC-aware timestamps
R-05: Replace bare except Exception in streaming_server/main.py with specific OSError handling and proper logger.error() call; let unexpected exceptions propagate for full tracebacks
R-06: Extract duplicated _get_product_prices_data method from OrderCreateView and OrderUpdateView into a shared OrderPriceMixin or module-level helper function
R-07: Delete dead SimpleLoggingMiddleware class from orders/middleware.py — it is never registered and fully superseded by RequestTelemetryMiddleware
R-08: Replace print() with logger.info() in RequestTelemetryMiddleware.__call__; add orders.middleware logger to LOGGING in settings.py
R-09: Load SECRET_KEY, DEBUG, and ALLOWED_HOSTS from environment variables in settings.py; set corresponding env vars in docker-compose.yml for the development environment

R-10: Add authentication to the user_lookup endpoint — restrict to is_staff users via @login_required + staff check, or protect with a shared X-Internal-Token secret header; alternatively, eliminate the endpoint by embedding username in the JSONL payload at write time
